response.overview: A surrealist horror fantasy filmed on Kodak VISION3. Two audio engineers create a sonic “infinity mirror” by cross‑wiring the circuitry of archaic analog gear. After years of trial and error, they finally make contact with an entity called The Walrus. As the entity seesaws through their bodies as a host, the encounter becomes an intimate triangle that unfolds in a single, unnerving conversation. The charge that allows the spirit to transfer is laughter or, more specifically, the energetic subtext of their laughter.
response.title: Walrus Inc.
